resources.string: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection and try again.
The server took too long to respond. Please try again later.
Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
Failed to process server response. Please try again or update the app.
A secure connection could not be established. Please check your network settings.
Failed to read or write data. Please check available storage and try again.
